revision.comment: Replacing Hospital_sign.svg with [[File:MUTCD_D9-2.svg]] (by [[commons:User:CommonsDelinker|CommonsDelinker]] because: File:Hospital_sign.svg merged with File:MUTCD D9-2.svg).
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: fixing this template
